description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored exoskeleton with a sleek, angular design, primarily in shades of blue-gray. The body is heavily built, with broad shoulders, a pronounced chest plate, and reinforced limbs, suggesting durability and strength. The head is helmet-like, lacking visible facial features, and is integrated smoothly into the torso, giving it a futuristic, tactical appearance. The arms and legs are segmented with visible joint areas, and the hands are shaped with defined fingers, indicating dexterity. On the back, there are two prominent, mechanical modules or packs, possibly for power or sensors, adding to its advanced technological look. The overall form is streamlined and symmetrical, with smooth, hard surfaces and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
description: A heavily armored, blue-gray humanoid robot with a helmeted head, reinforced limbs, and mechanical modules on its back. Its design is sleek, angular, and built for strength and durability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad chest plate, helmeted head, and symmetrical, muscular limbs with defined hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular head, segmented arm and leg joints, and the protruding mechanical module on the upper back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two large mechanical modules on the upper back and the reinforced structure of the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular head, arm and leg joints, and back module.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot is covered in integrated, armored panels with a smooth, metallic finish and minimal decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face is helmet-like with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose; it is smooth and angular, lacking expressive or display elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible segmented joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, suggesting hinge or rotary articulation; hands have defined fingers, indicating possible dexterity.
